title: At 48, almost at $3M… didn’t happen overnight
author: Angela-Cole
selftext:
Started way smaller than this

Made a lot of mistakes along the wayovertrading, chasing moves, not respecting risk

took me years to realizeit’s not about hitting big trades

it’s about staying consistent and protecting capital

now I keep things simplewait for clean setups, size properly, and don’t force tradesstill learning every day

there’s a bit more behind how I approach entries/exits
